response.overview: Sella, a university student who has been dating Angga for just a few months, finds herself confronted by a wave of murderous terror striking her campus. This reign of terror is no mere passing event, it ensnares the couple in a conflict that began long before they even met. Naura and Beni, Sella’s new friends, join her in the effort to unmask the mastermind behind the terror.
response.tagline: Every sin must be fully atoned.
response.title: ANGKARA
